title: THE USE OF SOME THIOLACTIC ANILIDES IN INORGANIC ANALYSIS
author: R. N. MISRA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Six new thiolactic anilides were prepared and their usefulness in analysis was investigated. In most cases Ag, Pb, Hg I  , Hg II  , Cu II , Cd, Bi, Sb, Fe III , Ni, Co, Zn and molybdate Were found to form complexes. Sensitivities for Ni and Co were found ont. A nickel complex was analysed and found to contain two molecules of the reagent per atom of nickel.
steps_raw: Six new thiolactic anilides were prepared and their usefulness in analysis was investigated. In most cases Ag, Pb, Hg I  , Hg II  , Cu II , Cd, Bi, Sb, Fe III , Ni, Co, Zn and molybdate Were found to form complexes. Sensitivities for Ni and Co were found ont.
